# Sample Environment Files

These files are starting points for common Switchboard deployments. Copy the blocks you need into your own `.env`, then replace example hosts, numbers, and secrets.

- `core.env.example`: server, storage, login, uploads, UI, and notifications.
- `telnyx.env.example`: Telnyx SMS/MMS, Group MMS, fax, and voice callbacks.
- `twilio.env.example`: Twilio SMS/MMS, Event Streams Group MMS, and voice callbacks.
- `revai.env.example`: Rev.ai voicemail transcription.
- `contacts.env.example`: Fastmail and Google Contacts sync.

Keep real `.env` files out of git. The examples intentionally use placeholder numbers and blank secrets.
